subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be My Glory! The hand of tyranny hath sought to conceal the radiant rays of the Sun of Justice and to veil the light of the Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ح س علیک بهائی ید ظلم اراده نموده انوار آفتاب عدل را ستر کند و نور امر را از
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
